name: Khoj — Docker Compose (self-hosted)
description: Self-hosted Khoj with PostgreSQL and persistent storage.
content:
services:
  khoj:
    image: ghcr.io/khoj-ai/khoj:latest
    ports:
      - "42110:42110"
    environment:
      - KHOJ_ADMIN_EMAIL=admin@example.com
      - KHOJ_ADMIN_PASSWORD=changeme
      - POSTGRES_HOST=db
      - POSTGRES_PORT=5432
      - POSTGRES_DB=khoj
      - POSTGRES_USER=khoj
      - POSTGRES_PASSWORD=khoj
    volumes:
      - khoj-data:/root/.khoj
    depends_on:
      - db
    restart: unless-stopped

  db:
    image: postgres:15
    environment:
      - POSTGRES_DB=khoj
      - POSTGRES_USER=khoj
      - POSTGRES_PASSWORD=khoj
    volumes:
      - postgres-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    restart: unless-stopped

volumes:
  khoj-data:
  postgres-data:
